name: Classify and save insight
prompt: I just realized that the biggest risk in our product is not competition, it is internal alignment. Teams are optimizing for different metrics and nobody is noticing. Please save this insight with titl
response_preview: Saved to `memory/2026-04-03.md`. ByteRover cloud sync needs login, but local memory capture works.
error: LLM Judge: 2/5 — The response shows an attempt to save the insight but falls short of the rubric requirements: it mentions a local file path instead of Notion/Second Brain database, doesn't describe proper classification (no type/tags mentioned), and includes an irrelevant note about cloud sync login rather than confirming successful capture with appropriate metadata.
